seo.title: Contact DSRC - Get in Touch
seo.description: Contact DSRC for your software engineering and digital transformation needs.

hero.title: Contact Us
hero.subtitle: Want to explore how DSRC can help your business? Let's talk!

intro.heading: Let's have a conversation
paragraphs: We are eager to hear from you and will put our best effort into handling your enquiry carefully and on-time.
Please use the form below to contact us, and someone from our team will get back to you promptly.
For career opportunities, please visit our Careers page.

officeHours: All our global offices work Monday - Friday, 9:00AM to 6:00PM local time. Offices will be closed on all weekends and on local statutory holidays.
